VAL-SYNC-005.reason: Electron app crashed during previous flow validator's sync-failure test, losing CDP connection. After restart, direct API tests show sync failure handling exists, but no dedicated red sync-failure toast was observed via UI. Warning toasts for connection failures are shown (yellow).

VAL-SYNC-006.reason: No sync conflicts exist in the system (getSyncConflictStats returns total:0), so the conflict detection badge cannot be verified. The ConflictResolutionDialog component exists in code but no trigger scenario is available.

VAL-SYNC-007.reason: No sync conflicts exist in the system, so the conflict resolution dialog cannot be opened. The backend API (resolveSyncConflict) exists but there's no UI path to reach it without pending conflicts.

VAL-SYNC-008.reason: Manual sync trigger API (triggerManualSync) exists and is exposed. Dashboard shows 'Sinkronisasi sekarang' button. Auto-sync also triggers when reconnecting after offline.

VAL-SYNC-009.reason: Sync Settings page has 'Riwayat Sync' button that opens a dialog with date/module/direction/status filters and pagination controls. Dialog structure matches spec. Data is empty in current state but UI is complete.

VAL-SYNC-010.reason: Status bar shows 'Next: baru saja' timer indicator. API getAutoSyncTimerStatus returns isRunning:true, nextSyncAt, and intervalMs.

VAL-SYNC-012.reason: Backend API getSyncHealthDashboardData exists and returns accurate queue/module stats. However, Sync Settings page does NOT display queue statistics, failed items list, or per-module breakdown in the UI. Only basic module configuration cards are shown.

VAL-SYNC-013.reason: Backend API retrySyncHealthFailedItem exists, but there are NO retry buttons in the Sync Settings UI for failed items. The failed items list is not rendered on the page.

frictions: Sync Settings UI is very minimal - only module path configuration cards are shown
Queue stats, failed items list, retry buttons, clear queue button, and connection quality indicator are missing from Sync Settings page UI
Sync history backend (getSyncHistory) throws 'datatype mismatch' error
All Kas transactions have syncStatus='pending' which may not reflect actual sync state
blockers: Electron crash in flow1 prevented testing of sync-failure toast and conflict UI
No sync conflicts exist in system, blocking conflict-related assertions
